notice: Synthetic GitHub issue used as a retrieval sample; not copied from a real repository.
title: PCIe link falls back to Gen3 after equalization timeout
body: During a simulated Gen4 validation run, the endpoint reaches Polling.Active but phase 3 equalization times out. The link recovers at Gen3 x4, records BadDLLP errors, and briefly drops from L0. Reproduce with sample log pcie_link_training.log.
expected_follow_up: Compare transmitter preset and receiver coefficient settings.
Repeat at Gen3 and Gen4 to isolate speed sensitivity.
Correlate BadDLLP count with the equalization timeout.
